heading: Employment of publicity experts; restrictions
label: 3107 Employment of publicity experts; restrictions
text: Appropriated funds may not be used to pay a publicity expert unless specifically appropriated for that purpose.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 54(last par. under “Interstate Commerce Commission”), .Oct. 22, 1913, ch. 32, § 138 Stat. 212The prohibition is restated in positive form.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
